name: Spark
description: Meet Spark, he is a Protogen that was designed created during one of the more interesting design eras of the DELTA corporation. (Dynamic Exo-Lunar Terraforming Apparatus) He is one of the more efficient staff members due to his strength and being capable of glowing in the dark. He also works as an electric pillow if heaters were to go out. He's an expert on strategizing for fights and Volcanology. He has some stickers placed on his metal arm pieces and chest. Overall cool to be around.
creator: Cosmo8166
